title: Markup Mode pre-build config
description: One config file that apply.sh bakes into every generated artifact's window.MarkupModeConfig at apply time (no runtime fetch). CLI flags override these per key; absent/empty config == built-in defaults. Edit by hand or via scripts/config.sh set <key> <value>. Comments (// and /* */) and an annotated header are tolerated on read and preserved across set.

$schema.description: Editor schema hint (ignored by apply.sh and config.sh). Points at this schema file for VS Code autocomplete/validation.

accent.description: Layer accent color (--mm-accent): marks, highlight underline, primary buttons, active states. CSS color, e.g. "#3b82f6". apply.sh --accent overrides this.

accentSoft.description: --mm-accent-soft: highlight fill / soft backgrounds. Usually an rgba() of the accent at ~15-22%. Never auto-sniffed from the host; set explicitly if the default translucent accent does not suit.

accentInk.description: --mm-accent-ink: text/icon color on accent-filled buttons (must pass WCAG AA against the accent). Derived automatically if omitted.

bg2.description: --mm-bg2: row hover, inner fields, secondary buttons (secondary surface).

font.description: --mm-font: chrome typeface (dock/popup only; the compiled-Markdown box always stays monospace). e.g. "Georgia, serif".

fontScale.description: Multiplies the --mm-fs-* type ramp. Clamped to [0.85, 1.4].

themeFile.description: Path to a theme document (themes/*.json) to inline into MarkupModeConfig.theme. A whole look (colors + font + fontScale) in one file. Relative paths resolve from the config file's directory. apply.sh --theme overrides this. Individual color keys above win over the theme doc for the same token.

ns.description: localStorage namespace (MarkupModeConfig.ns). Share one note set across URLs by giving every artifact the same stable ns. Default: derived per-file as "markup-mode:<filename>". apply.sh --ns overrides this.

sourcePath.description: Default value for the compiled "Source:" line (MarkupModeConfig.sourcePath). Normally left empty so apply.sh records each target's own absolute path; set only if every artifact should report a fixed canonical path. apply.sh --source overrides this.

shortcut.description: Toggle-comment-mode chord (MarkupModeConfig.shortcut). mod = Cmd/Ctrl. Default: Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+K. apply.sh --shortcut "mod+shift+k" overrides this.

keymap.description: Rebind layer keys without editing source (MarkupModeConfig.keymap). Baked at apply time; overlays the built-in keymap, under which runtime per-page preferences still win. apply.sh --keymap KEY=CHORD overrides individual entries.

toggle.description: Alias for shortcut (toggle comment mode). If both shortcut and keymap.toggle are set, keymap.toggle is applied after and wins.

addRef.description: Modifier held (while a note is open) to insert/copy a [ref:] anchor. Default Alt/Option.

resizeUp.description: Key to grow the element-anchor selection up the target chain. Default ArrowUp.

resizeDown.description: Key to shrink the element-anchor selection. Default ArrowDown.

copyRef.description: Optional chord to toggle Copy-ref mode (copies a [ref:] token instead of leaving a note). null = disabled (default).

autoTheme.description: Sniff the host's :root for recognizable tokens (--accent, --bg, --text, --border, ...) and adopt them where no explicit color is set. Default true. Set false to disable host-token sniffing entirely.

behavior.description: Initial runtime preferences baked into MarkupModeConfig.prefs. These seed the per-namespace localStorage prefs on first open of an artifact; once a reviewer changes a setting in the gear panel, their localStorage choice wins for that namespace.

themeMode.description: Initial appearance mode. Default auto (follows prefers-color-scheme / host).

showMarks.description: Show pins and outlines on mount. Default true. False hides marks without deleting notes.

openOnReveal.description: Single-clicking a mark also opens and scrolls the dock note list. Default true.
